se.alexanderjonsson

Class InternetTime

  • java.lang.Object
    • se.alexanderjonsson.InternetTime

  • public final class InternetTime
extends java.lang.Object

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.lang.Double getCurrentTimeAsDouble()
      This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as a Double.
      static java.lang.Integer getCurrentTimeAsInteger()
      This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as an integer.
      static java.lang.String getCurrentTimeAsString()
      This method overloads getCurrentTimeAsString(TimeFormat format)
      static java.lang.String getCurrentTimeAsString(TimeFormat format)
      This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as a String.

    • Method Detail

      • getCurrentTimeAsInteger

        public static java.lang.Integer getCurrentTimeAsInteger()
        This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as an integer.
        Returns:
        an Integer representing the current time in .beats

      • getCurrentTimeAsDouble

        public static java.lang.Double getCurrentTimeAsDouble()
        This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as a Double.
        Returns:
        a Double representing the current time in .beats

      • getCurrentTimeAsString

        public static java.lang.String getCurrentTimeAsString(TimeFormat format)
        This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as a String. The string can be formatted by supplying the desired TimeFormat enum
        Parameters:
        format - select the desired TimeFormat enum to pick how the string is formatted
        Returns:
        a string formatted according to the chosen parameter.

      • getCurrentTimeAsString

        public static java.lang.String getCurrentTimeAsString()
        This method overloads getCurrentTimeAsString(TimeFormat format)
        Returns:
        a String representing the current time in .beats

      • getCurrentTimePrettyString

        public static java.lang.String getCurrentTimePrettyString()
        Returns:
        a pretty string representation of the current time in .beats.
